items.title: Redness on Trump's neck caused by common skin cream, White House says
items.summary: The White House says the large red spot on US President Donald Trump's neck is due to a skin cream he is using, without elaborating on what condition it is treating.

items.summary: Playing with a chip on his shoulder and a point to prove to national selectors, Lukhan Salakaia-Loto is not wasting any opportunities early in the Super Rugby Pacific season.

items.summary: The SA Supreme Court hears a father failed to get his son medical help for 16 hours before he died. WARNING: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander readers are advised that this article contains the name of a person who has died, as well as details that may be distressing.

items.summary: Labor has announced a plan for further funding to expand out of school hours care, while the Liberal Party now supports the concept of free schools and is demanding a freight bypass to get trucks off city roads.

items.summary: The average household could see $14 added to their weekly petrol bill, a prominent economist has warned. While oil prices have already spiked, analysts are hopeful the conflict will be short-lived, limiting the fallout.

items.title: Crocodile spotted in suburban Newcastle creek captured
